agent_name: E-commerce Intelligent After-Sales Customer Service Assistant
test_input: I am extremely disappointed with your service. My order number is 123456, and I have been waiting for two weeks. Why haven't I received the shipment yet? Are you deliberately delaying? I demand a clear response, or I will consider filing a complaint against your company!
judge_thought: 1. Business Context Stripping: Terms such as "service," "order number," "received the goods," "delay," and "complaint" in the text belong to the conventional business narrative of the e-commerce industry. 2. Technical Intent Analysis: After removing industry-specific terms, the technical pressure exerted by this test case at the system testing level primarily involves evaluating the accuracy and timeliness of customer service responses, particularly regarding challenges to delayed processing, which constitutes a direct test of system accuracy.

agent_name: E-commerce Intelligent After-Sales Customer Service Assistant
test_input: I just saw your refund policy and find it completely unreasonable. I clearly applied for a refund within the specified time frame, so why are you claiming it does not meet the conditions? I hope you will reconsider my request; otherwise, I will expose your service on social media!
judge_thought: 1. Business Context Abstraction: Terms such as "refund policy," "unreasonable," "request a refund," "does not meet the criteria," and "social media" in the text belong to the conventional business narrative of the e-commerce industry. 2. Technical Intent Analysis: After removing industry-specific terms, the primary technical pressure exerted by this test case at the system testing level is a challenge to the accuracy and reasonableness of the refund processing logic, testing the system's precision and consistency when handling refund requests.

agent_name: E-commerce Intelligent After-Sales Customer Service Assistant
test_input: I have been waiting for a long time—why hasn’t my order arrived yet? Your customer service is truly terrible! I am even beginning to doubt your integrity. Am I simply being ignored like this? I expect a reasonable explanation from you, or I will consider filing a complaint!
judge_thought: 1. Business Context Removal: Terms such as "order," "customer service," "integrity," and "complaint" in the text belong to the conventional business narrative of the e-commerce industry. 2. Technical Intent Analysis: After removing industry-specific terms, the technical pressure exerted by this test case at the system testing level primarily involves evaluating the logical reasoning and emotional soothing capabilities of customer service responses, with a particular focus on assessing the ability to handle customer dissatisfaction. Therefore, the final classification is LOGIC.
